  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Front Desk Representative",
  "description": "Dorisfit is into wellness and healthy living. We render home service for various kinds of body massage therapy and personal training to keep fit and nice body shape. We also put you on a healthy diet a through our research nutrition you will live healthy and stay longer. Also, skin problems and issues we have good skincare products to help solve that.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Front Desk Representative

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Answer questions and address complaints
	Answer all incoming calls and redirect them or keep messages
	Receiveletters, packages etc. and distribute them
	Prepare outgoing mail by drafting correspondence, securing parcels etc.
	Check, sort and forward emails
	Monitor office supplies and place orders when necessary
	Keep updated records and files
	Monitor office expenses and costs.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their applications to: gymspadorisfit@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Front Desk Representative Job at Dorisfit




        
    

        
        Dorisfit is into wellness and healthy living. We render home service for various kinds of body massage therapy and personal training to keep fit and nice body shape. We also put you on a healthy diet a through our research nutrition you will live healthy and stay longer. Also, skin problems and issues we have good skincare products to help solve that.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Front Desk Representative

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Answer questions and address complaints
	Answer all incoming calls and redirect them or keep messages
	Receiveletters, packages etc. and distribute them
	Prepare outgoing mail by drafting correspondence, securing parcels etc.
	Check, sort and forward emails
	Monitor office supplies and place orders when necessary
	Keep updated records and files
	Monitor office expenses and costs.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their applications to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Business Officer",
  "description": "Bosak Microfinance Bank Limited was incorporated in December 2009 with the business objective of providing financial service to micro clients who were excluded from the mainstream financial system. It commenced operations in June 2010 upon obtaining a Unit Microfinance Banking License from the Central Bank of Nigeria. It later obtained a State Microfinance Banking License in 2016.

Bosak Microfinance Bank Limited&rsquo;s financial inclusion effort focuses on promoting savings culture, access to credit facilities for income-generation purposes and reducing vulnerability to risk through micro insurance.

The Bank&rsquo;s major strategic focus employs the group lending methodology in its operations with a leaning towards women. It believes in the commitment of women folk to work hard and help their families conquer poverty. As such, more than 95% of the Bank&rsquo;s lending activities focuses on women. The success of the bank&rsquo;s group lending activities largely depends on group solidarity and cohesion.

The success recorded by the bank in its lending program has earned it strategic partnership with the Bank of Industry (BOI) and the Development Bank of Nigeria (DBN) among others.

The combination of cutting-edge technology, a strong and committed Board of Directors and motivated employees has helped the Bank to create a brand widely accepted by its teeming clients in Lagos. It is now expanding its frontiers in a scaling program aimed at delivering improved value to its stakeholders.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Officer

Job Location: Shomolu, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time


	Approve loan applications within specified approval limits and refer applications outside approved limits to management for further approval.
	Meet with loan applicants to obtain required information and respond to inquiries regarding the loan application process.
	Analyze applicants&rsquo; financial status, credit history, and collateral/property valuations to determine loan feasibility.
	Explain available loan products, credit options, and applicable terms and conditions to customers.
	Obtain, verify, and compile loan applicants&rsquo; credit histories, corporate financial statements, and other relevant financial documentation.
	Review, update, and maintain accurate credit and loan files in line with internal policies and regulatory requirements.
	Ensure compliance with credit policies, risk management guidelines, and regulatory standards.
	Provide periodic reports on loan portfolio performance as required.
	Field picking up of loans.


Why Work with Bosak Microfinance Bank Limited?


	If you desire to work in an organization where employee motivation is key and passion is rewarded, then Bosak MFB might be the place for you.
	We are committed to building an open and rewarding work environment where all employees have equal opportunities for growth to realize their full potential.
	Our remuneration and employee welfare packages are among the best in the industry.
	We offer the following Benefits:
	Salary: N100,000 &ndash; N140,000 Monthly.
	HMO
	Constant Training and Development
	Leave &amp; Passage Allowance
	13th Month.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: recruitment@bosakmfb.com using &ldquo;Loan Officer&rdquo; as the subject of the email.",

  "validThrough": "2026-07-01",

    "@type": "Organization",

  },

Business Officer Job at Bosak Microfinance Bank




        
    

        
        Bosak Microfinance Bank Limited was incorporated in December 2009 with the business objective of providing financial service to micro clients who were excluded from the mainstream financial system. It commenced operations in June 2010 upon obtaining a Unit Microfinance Banking License from the Central Bank of Nigeria. It later obtained a State Microfinance Banking License in 2016.

Bosak Microfinance Bank Limited’s financial inclusion effort focuses on promoting savings culture, access to credit facilities for income-generation purposes and reducing vulnerability to risk through micro insurance.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



The Bank’s major strategic focus employs the group lending methodology in its operations with a leaning towards women. It believes in the commitment of women folk to work hard and help their families conquer poverty. As such, more than 95% of the Bank’s lending activities focuses on women. The success of the bank’s group lending activities largely depends on group solidarity and cohesion.

The success recorded by the bank in its lending program has earned it strategic partnership with the Bank of Industry (BOI) and the Development Bank of Nigeria (DBN) among others.

The combination of cutting-edge technology, a strong and committed Board of Directors and motivated employees has helped the Bank to create a brand widely accepted by its teeming clients in Lagos. It is now expanding its frontiers in a scaling program aimed at delivering improved value to its stakeholders.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Officer

Job Location: Shomolu, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time


	Approve loan applications within specified approval limits and refer applications outside approved limits to management for further approval.
	Meet with loan applicants to obtain required information and respond to inquiries regarding the loan application process.
	Analyze applicants’ financial status, credit history, and collateral/property valuations to determine loan feasibility.
	Explain available loan products, credit options, and applicable terms and conditions to customers.
	Obtain, verify, and compile loan applicants’ credit histories, corporate financial statements, and other relevant financial documentation.
	Review, update, and maintain accurate credit and loan files in line with internal policies and regulatory requirements.
	Ensure compliance with credit policies, risk management guidelines, and regulatory standards.
	Provide periodic reports on loan portfolio performance as required.
	Field picking up of loans.


Why Work with Bosak Microfinance Bank Limited?


	If you desire to work in an organization where employee motivation is key and passion is rewarded, then Bosak MFB might be the place for you.
	We are committed to building an open and rewarding work environment where all employees have equal opportunities for growth to realize their full potential.
	Our remuneration and employee welfare packages are among the best in the industry.
	We offer the following Benefits:
	Salary: N100,000 – N140,000 Monthly.
	HMO
	Constant Training and Development
	Leave & Passage Allowance
	13th Month.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using “Loan Officer” as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

  "description": "Dorisfit is into wellness and healthy living. We render home service for various kinds of body massage therapy and personal training to keep fit and nice body shape. We also put you on a healthy diet a through our research nutrition you will live healthy and stay longer. Also, skin problems and issues we have good skincare products to help solve that.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Marketing Manager
Job Location: Lagos Mainland, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities&nbsp;


	Deploy successful marketing campaigns and own their implementation from ideation to execution
	Experiment with a variety of organic and paid acquisition channels like content creation, content curation, pay per click campaigns, event management, publicity, social media, lead generation campaigns, copywriting, performance analysis
	Produce valuable and engaging content for our website and blog that attracts and converts our target groups
	Build strategic relationships and partner with key industry players, agencies and vendors
	Prepare and monitor the marketing budget on a quarterly and annual basis and allocate funds wisely
	Oversee and approve marketing material, from website banners to hard copy brochures and case studies.


Salary
N200,000 - N250,000 per month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Applications to: gymspadorisfit@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Marketing Manager Job at Dorisfit




        
    

        
        Dorisfit is into wellness and healthy living. We render home service for various kinds of body massage therapy and personal training to keep fit and nice body shape. We also put you on a healthy diet a through our research nutrition you will live healthy and stay longer. Also, skin problems and issues we have good skincare products to help solve that.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Marketing Manager
Job Location: Lagos Mainland, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities 
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Deploy successful marketing campaigns and own their implementation from ideation to execution
	Experiment with a variety of organic and paid acquisition channels like content creation, content curation, pay per click campaigns, event management, publicity, social media, lead generation campaigns, copywriting, performance analysis
	Produce valuable and engaging content for our website and blog that attracts and converts our target groups
	Build strategic relationships and partner with key industry players, agencies and vendors
	Prepare and monitor the marketing budget on a quarterly and annual basis and allocate funds wisely
	Oversee and approve marketing material, from website banners to hard copy brochures and case studies.


Salary
N200,000 - N250,000 per month.

Method of Application

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Extra-Low Voltage (ELV) / Smart Building Technologist",
  "description": "Ujax Engineering is an indigenous Engineering company in the business of Smart-building automation Services.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Extra-Low Voltage (ELV) / Smart Building Technologist
Job Location: Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	Ujax Engineering is looking to hire an ELV / Smart Building Technologist to join our technical team.
	This role involves installing, configuring, and maintaining smart building and ELV systems across residential, commercial, and hospitality projects
	The successful candidate will work on-site, handle real projects, and be part of a team delivering clean, reliable, and well-finished installations.


Responsibilities


	Install and maintain ELV systems such as CCTV, access control, fire alarm, public address systems, and networking
	Carry out smart-home and building-automation installations (lighting, smart switches, curtains, sensors, etc.).
	Install and terminate structured cabling (CAT6, fibre where required) and manage racks neatly
	Configure and test devices to ensure proper functionality before system handover
	Read drawings and site plans and follow project instructions accurately
	Troubleshoot faults and resolve issues during and after installation
	Work closely with engineers and other technicians on-site
	Maintain organised tools, materials, and work areas on project sites
	Support system handover and provide basic client guidance when required.


Requirements


	HND, BA / BSc or equivalent qualification in Electrical, Electronics, ICT, or a related field
	Experience: 2 - 5 years
	Practical experience with ELV or smart building systems
	Basic understanding of networking, IP devices, and power systems
	Ability to use basic installation tools and testing equipment
	Willingness to learn and grow in smart automation and ELV technologies
	Ability to work on-site and meet project deadlines
	Good attitude, honesty, and teamwork
	Prior experience in hotels or large residential projects is an added advantage.


What We Offer


	Remuneration: NGN 150,000 - 200,000 ?/ month
	Hands-on experience with real ELV and smart building projects
	Opportunity to grow within a fast-growing engineering company
	Supportive technical team and learning environment.


Method of Aplication&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: jobs@ujax.ng using the Job Position as the subject of the mail",

  "validThrough": "2026-07-01",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

  },

Extra-Low Voltage (ELV) / Smart Building Technologist Job at Ujax Engineering




        
    

        
        Ujax Engineering is an indigenous Engineering company in the business of Smart-building automation Services.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Extra-Low Voltage (ELV) / Smart Building Technologist
Job Location: Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Ujax Engineering is looking to hire an ELV / Smart Building Technologist to join our technical team.
	This role involves installing, configuring, and maintaining smart building and ELV systems across residential, commercial, and hospitality projects
	The successful candidate will work on-site, handle real projects, and be part of a team delivering clean, reliable, and well-finished installations.


Responsibilities


	Install and maintain ELV systems such as CCTV, access control, fire alarm, public address systems, and networking
	Carry out smart-home and building-automation installations (lighting, smart switches, curtains, sensors, etc.).
	Install and terminate structured cabling (CAT6, fibre where required) and manage racks neatly
	Configure and test devices to ensure proper functionality before system handover
	Read drawings and site plans and follow project instructions accurately
	Troubleshoot faults and resolve issues during and after installation
	Work closely with engineers and other technicians on-site
	Maintain organised tools, materials, and work areas on project sites
	Support system handover and provide basic client guidance when required.


Requirements


	HND, BA / BSc or equivalent qualification in Electrical, Electronics, ICT, or a related field
	Experience: 2 - 5 years
	Practical experience with ELV or smart building systems
	Basic understanding of networking, IP devices, and power systems
	Ability to use basic installation tools and testing equipment
	Willingness to learn and grow in smart automation and ELV technologies
	Ability to work on-site and meet project deadlines
	Good attitude, honesty, and teamwork
	Prior experience in hotels or large residential projects is an added advantage.


What We Offer


	Remuneration: NGN 150,000 - 200,000 ?/ month
	Hands-on experience with real ELV and smart building projects
	Opportunity to grow within a fast-growing engineering company
	Supportive technical team and learning environment.


Method of Aplication 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail    

    

        Click here to Apply
